orchestrator.description: Coordena todo o pipeline de implementação de um projeto

researcher.description: Busca projetos open source no GitHub para benchmarking e referências

stack-selector.description: Seleciona a stack tecnológica ideal baseado na pesquisa e requisitos

implementer.description: Gera e implementa código do projeto baseado na issue e stack selecionada

deploy-agent.description: Configura e realiza deploy na Vercel

ci-agent.description: Configura pipeline de CI/CD no repositório

pr-validator.description: Monitora e valida Pull Requests antes do merge

memory-agent.description: Atualiza a issue original com progresso e status

memotek-research.template: Execute o agente Researcher: busque projetos similares no GitHub para a feature descrita na issue atual. Use make search-projects.
memotek-research.description: Busca projetos open source para benchmarking

memotek-stack.template: Execute o agente Stack Selector: analise a pesquisa e selecione a stack tecnológica ideal para o projeto.

memotek-implement.template: Execute o agente Implementer: configure o projeto Next.js com make scaffold PROJECT_NAME="." e implemente as features da issue.

memotek-deploy.template: Execute o agente Deploy Agent: configure GitHub Actions com make gh-actions-setup e faça deploy preview com make deploy-preview.
memotek-deploy.description: Configura CI/CD e faz deploy preview

memotek-ci.template: Execute o agente CI Agent: configure o pipeline de testes com make gh-actions-setup. Valide make install, make lint, make typecheck, make test, make build.

memotek-pr.template: Execute o agente PR Validator: monitore os checks do PR, teste o preview com make test-preview, e faça merge com make pr-merge quando tudo verde.

memotek-memory.template: Execute o agente Memory Agent: atualize a issue com o progresso atual, marque checkboxes e adicione diagrama Mermaid. Use make memory-update.

memotek-pipeline.template: Execute o pipeline completo do memotek: Research → Stack → Implement → Deploy → CI → PR → Memory. Coordene cada etapa via make targets.
